# Board Game Insights

## Problem
I'm obsessed with board games and need new supply to meet demand. I'm also a data analyst. So why not explore board game data?
## Data
Dilini Samarasinghe, July 5, 2021, "BoardGameGeek Dataset on Board Games", IEEE Dataport, doi: https://dx.doi.org/10.21227/9g61-bs59.
## Project Status: Under Active Development
This project is currently a **Work in Progress**. I am currently documenting my EDA process. 

### 📍 Current Progress
- [x] Initial Data Diagnostic & Structural Fixes
- [x] Duplicate Name Handling & "Version Control" Logic
- [ ] Text Standardization (Mechanics & Domains Corpus)
- [ ] Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- [ ] Predictive Modeling (Complexity vs. Rating)
